instructions.summary: Write a safe status summary; do not run long validation inline.

strategy_recommendations.summary: Hold scaling until targeted materialized QA and representative concurrent QA are both PASS.
success_criteria: Targeted materialized Plex decision QA remains PASS
Representative 5+ concurrent materialized QA remains PASS before larger scaling

risk_mitigations.summary: If targeted materialized decision QA or representative concurrent QA regresses, hold batch-size increases and quarantine only confirmed bad source/release rows while keeping titles retryable.
success_criteria: No broad legacy/direct resolver expansion resumes
Only confirmed bad source rows are quarantined
Batch scaling resumes only after targeted and concurrent QA return PASS

autonomy_suggestions.summary: When basic process launch times out, stop inline probing and rely on hidden scheduled workers plus public status files.
success_criteria: No repeated inline process-launch probes during saturation
Bridge and consumer still publish status through scheduled tasks

cycle_commentary.summary: Controlled expansion should remain bounded until QA gates are fully PASS.

batch_recommendation.reason: One or more expansion gates is not PASS.
